fields.name: Query No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the query that is used to generate column data in the chart.

fields.name: Query Column No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the query column that is used to generate column data in the chart.

fields.name: Column Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the query that is used to generate column data in the chart.

fields.name: Column Data Type
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Column Type
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Aggregation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of aggregation on the y-axis, such as Sum or Max.
